payload.answer: Required eval accounting fields: token_counts (tokens used), provider_id (source provider), model_id (model variant), estimated_price (predicted cost for the usage), latency_p50 (median latency), latency_p90 (90th percentile latency), latency_p95 (95th percentile latency). These fields enable cost estimation, attribution, and performance monitoring.
payload.decision: provide a concise breakdown of required evaluation accounting fields for cost, latency, and usage tracking, including token counts, provider/model IDs, estimated price, and latency percentiles.

entity_resolution.reason: definitional fields are standard; no ambiguities resolved at this time

memory_cards.statement: Evaluation accounting fields for a memory system should capture usage metrics (token counts), source identifiers (provider and model IDs), financial estimate (estimated price), and performance metrics (latency at p50, p90, p95).

details: Field list for evaluation accounting defined
